metadata.description: SHAI — personal AI coding assistant. Modular plugin system for VS Code / GitHub Copilot with instructions, skills, agents, and hooks.

plugins.name: shai-core
plugins.description: Cross-cutting coding standards, general-purpose agents, and universal workflows. Every project should install this.

plugins.name: shai-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript-specific conventions and workflows. Install alongside shai-core for any TS project.

plugins.name: shai-react
plugins.description: React + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn patterns. Component conventions, scaffolding, and testing workflows.

plugins.name: shai-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js App Router conventions, scaffolding, and page generation. Install alongside shai-typescript and shai-core for any Next.js project.

plugins.name: shai-dotnet
plugins.description: C# conventions, Clean Architecture, DDD/CQRS patterns, and .NET testing workflows.

plugins.name: shai-product
plugins.description: Product discovery pipeline: from raw idea to actionable development tasks. Includes idea evaluation, feature mapping, story decomposition, and task breakdown.
